# config-root-refs-allowlist.txt — doc-scope legacy ~/.claude references that
# are legitimately KEPT (not converted to the config-root-generic form).
# Grammar (verify-config-root-refs.py): `path:line  # reason` (reason mandatory),
# or a bare `path` (no `:line`), which covers the whole file.
# Prefer the line pin: a stale pin forces a human to re-read the reference. Reach
# for the whole-file form only when the ordinal is not the reference's identity —
# an append-only, machine-generated file, where any insertion above shifts every
# pin below it and the re-pin carries no review value.
# An entry ships in the SAME commit as the file it governs: an entry added ahead
# of its file reads as stale in every clean checkout (see 77ce06c).
# Categories mirror docs/migrations/config-root-tails-worklist.tsv.
# Code scope (*.py/*.sh) is governed by S2's enumerator — never listed here.

CLAUDE.md:150  # keep:legacy-fallback — legacy ~/.claude described as the personal/legacy-fallback location
